raw_consumer_statement: Im an authorized user and manager of my moms American Express gold card who has been a member since the XXXX. With her permission I made XXXX {$25000.00} payments to XXXX XXXX for court rental time for our XXXX XXXX basketball organization. After paying XXXX the courts were always either double booked or we were unable to practice. I also made a payment of $ XXXX towards the balance before the statement was even due. Even after that Amex had a program call and threaten my XXXX year old mother telling her if she didnt sign up they were coming to take everything she had. We paid on the statement before it was even due and they treated her as if we were 3 months behind.I filed a dispute with Amex in XXXX because we were unable to receive the service we paid for in advance. I sent my invoices of payment for our proof. The merchant has yet to respond to Amex but they continue to push their deadline back month after month as if {$50000.00} isnt important. They have continuously lied to us and gave us the run around. They have done something outside the guidelines and I know they are stalling us trying to clean it up. Could you please reach out to me at your earliest convenience.
